code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about a company (or related entities) into a single,
    fluent English sentence. Each predicate is rendered with a suitable phrase;
    unknown predicates fall back to a generic “subject predicate object” pattern.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Mapping from predicate to a small function that builds a clause.
    phrase_map = {
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{s} is based in {o}",
        "foundingDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was founded on {o}",
        "industry": lambda s, o: f"{s} operates in the {o}",
        "city": lambda s, o: f"{s} is located in {o}",
        "netIncome": lambda s, o: f"{s} reported a net income of {o}",
        "operatingIncome": lambda s, o: f"{s} reported an operating income of {o}",
        "regionServed": lambda s, o: f"{s} serves the {o}",
        "areaTotal": lambda s, o: f"{s} covers a total area of {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"{s} is led by {o}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s leader holds the title of {o}",
        "populationDensity": lambda s, o: f"{s} has a population density of {o}",
        "foundationPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was founded in {o}",
        "numberOfEmployees": lambda s, o: f"{s} employs {o} people",
        "numberOfLocations": lambda s, o: f"{s} operates {o} locations",
        "service": lambda s, o: f"{s} provides {o}",
        "type": lambda s, o: f"{s} is a {o}",
        "alternativeName": lambda s, o: f"{s} is also known as {o}",
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born on {o}",
        "keyPerson": lambda s, o: f"{s} lists {o} as a key person",
        "cost": lambda s, o: f"The cost of {s} is {o}",
        "location": lambda s, o: f"{s} is located in {o}",
        "product": lambda s, o: f"{s} offers the product {o}",
        "subsidiary": lambda s, o: f"{s} has the subsidiary {o}",
        "timeZone": lambda s, o: f"{s} lies in the {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"{s} is part of {o}",
        "parentCompany": lambda s, o: f"{s} is owned by {o}",
        "capital": lambda s, o: f"The capital of {s} is {o}",
        "motto": lambda s, o: f"The motto of {s} is {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"The official language of {s} is {o}",
        "leaderParty": lambda s, o: f"The leader of {s} belongs to the {o}",
        "areaUrban": lambda s, o: f"{s} has an urban area of {o}",
        "part": lambda s, o: f"{s} includes {o}",
        "revenue": lambda s, o: f"{s} generated revenue of {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda s, o: f"{s} includes the ethnic group {o}",
        "governmentType": lambda s, o: f"{s} has a government type of {o}",
        "percentageOfAreaWater": lambda s, o: f"{o}% of {s}'s area is water",
        "longName": lambda s, o: f"The full name of {s} is {o}",
        "populationTotal": lambda s, o: f"{s} has a total population of {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"{s} speaks {o}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": lambda s, o: f"{s} lies at an elevation of {o} meters above sea level",
    }

    clauses = []
    for triple in triples:
        subj, pred, obj = triple.subject, triple.predicate, triple.object
        phrase_func = phrase_map.get(pred)
        if phrase_func:
            clauses.append(phrase_func(subj, obj))
        else:
            # fallback generic rendering
            clauses.append(f"{subj} {pred} {obj}")

    # Join clauses into a fluent sentence
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        sentence = clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
